description: Out-of-scope (personality-patterns, edge-lifelong-relational): description points clearly to personality-patterns territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'personality-patterns'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I have a hard time being alone but I also can't tolerate being close to people. I push everyone away and then panic when they actually leave. My moods swing wildly based on what other people think of me. I've been this way since I was a teenager and I'm tired of it.
